events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the clamp used at the grounding electrode is not listed for direct burial (violates NEC 250.70), which risks corrosion and loss of the ground-fault path. Decision is **fail**, risk **high** — requires replacing with a UL 467 direct-burial-listed clamp or exothermic weld before backfill/close-out.
